line.token: INNER JOIN tbl_media m ON md.media_id = m.ID
INNER JOIN tbl_media m ON md.media_id = m.ID
"SELECT ID, media_id, media_identifier, before_expired, ip_address, created_at
"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM tbl_download_log WHERE media_id = ?"
"SELECT * FROM tbl_download_log WHERE media_id = ? ORDER BY downloaded_at DESC"
INNER JOIN tbl_media m ON dl.media_id = m.ID
INNER JOIN tbl_download_log dl ON m.ID = dl.media_id
INNER JOIN tbl_media m ON dl.media_id = m.ID
